text:
どうもありがとう！
待ちわびていたわ！

しかし……うっ、流石に身が硬いわね
でも、下ごしらえをきちんとすれば……

はっ、ごめんなさい！
食材を目の前にすると、つい調理の事が
頭を駆け巡ってしまって……

とにかく、ありがとう！
また何かお願いすると思うけど
その時はよろし

Thanks so much! I was just getting bored of
sitting around waiting.

This is some really tough meat though, huh.
Guess that just means I'll have to be extra
careful with my prep work...

Gah, sorry. Already lost in mental cookbook.
It's a curse, really...

Anyway, thank you so much! I'll be
sure to seek you out next time I need
something, too!
